name: BASE RUNNER
description: Defend the Base chain from Gas Goblins, Rug Bots and Bridge Trolls! A retro pixel art brawler for Farcaster.
longDescription: BASE RUNNER is a Farcaster Mini App game where you defend the Base blockchain from waves of crypto villains. Jump over obstacles, punch Gas Goblins, dodge Rug Bot projectiles, and defeat the massive Bridge Troll boss. Share your score on Farcaster after each run!
